effect: Increased bleeding risk — both inhibit platelet function/clotting
Antacids chelate ciprofloxacin — reduced absorption by up to 90%
Disulfiram-like reaction — severe nausea, vomiting, flushing
Azithromycin inhibits CYP3A4 — increases warfarin levels
Ciprofloxacin inhibits CYP1A2 — theophylline toxicity risk
Cross-reactive — use cautiously in penicillin-sensitive patients
Reduced chloroquine absorption — separate by 4 hours
